meta.name: DateDrop Background Doodle Art
meta.purpose: Background image for DateDrop invitation app — neo-brutalist doodle style

prompt.summary: A hand-drawn doodle art pattern on a clean white background, featuring scattered dating and date-night related illustrations in a playful neo-brutalist sketch style with thick black ink outlines and soft pastel accent fills.

style.artStyle: doodle, hand-drawn, sketch, line art, illustration
style.lineWork: thick bold black ink outlines, slightly uneven hand-drawn feel, confident strokes
style.fillStyle: minimal flat pastel color fills — soft pink (#fce7f3), mint green (#dcfce7), baby blue (#e0f2fe), pale yellow (#fef9c3), light purple (#f3e8ff), peach (#ffedd5)
style.background: pure white (#FFFFFF) or very light warm white (#FAFAF9)
style.mood: playful, romantic, casual, fun, inviting, youthful
style.influences: neo-brutalism, sticker art, bullet journal doodles, Memphis design, Keith Haring energy

elements: heart with a small arrow through it
slice of pizza with melting cheese
bicycle with a basket of flowers
music notes floating out of a speaker
ice cream cone with a cherry on top
speech bubble with a heart inside
calendar page with a heart circled
confetti dots and squiggles scattered throughout
tiny abstract squiggles and marks for texture

layoutGuidelines.composition: scattered pattern, evenly distributed across the canvas, no single focal point — designed as a repeatable background texture
layoutGuidelines.density: medium density — enough white space between doodles so it feels airy, not cluttered
layoutGuidelines.scale: each doodle element roughly 60-120px in the final 1920x1080 canvas
layoutGuidelines.rotation: vary rotation slightly on each element (5-15 degrees) for organic feel
layoutGuidelines.spacing: minimum 40px gap between any two elements
layoutGuidelines.edges: elements can bleed off edges for a seamless pattern feel

usage.placement: absolute background behind the app content, low opacity (3-5%) as a subtle texture, or full opacity as a hero splash
usage.cssExample: background-image: url('/images/bg-doodle.png'); background-size: cover; background-repeat: repeat; opacity: 0.04;
usage.altUsage: Full opacity behind the landing/hero section with a white overlay gradient fading into the main content
